## Meeting Purpose

[Explore event space options at Chase Center for GrowthX's diverse event needs](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Chase Center offers versatile spaces for 75-1500+ attendees: intimate clubs, arena floor setups, rooftop venue](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - [Flexible F\&B options through Bon Appetit/Levy, with customizable bar packages and outside catering allowed in some spaces](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Impressive tech capabilities: customizable LED screens, center-hung jumbotron for presentations, silent disco headphones for breakouts](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=820.0)
  - ["Above the Rim" 9th floor space is the premium offering with 360° views, private entry, 300-person capacity](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

## Topics

### Venue Spaces and Capacities

  - [J.P. Morgan Club: "Sexiest club", 75-150 capacity, marble bar, leather couches, chandeliers](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Chase Club: Larger space, 350 capacity, connects to arena floor](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [United Club: Largest club, 700-1500 capacity with concourse overflow, 360° bar](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Modelo: Cocktail space with arena view, 150-200 capacity](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1232.0)
  - [Above the Rim: 9th floor premium space, 160 seated/300 reception, private patio](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)

### Technological Capabilities

  - [Customizable IPTV screens throughout venues for branding/sponsor recognition](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Center-hung jumbotron can lower to 5 feet off ground for presentations](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Silent disco headphones used for multi-stage breakout sessions in arena bowl](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)

### Food and Beverage

  - [Bon Appetit/Levy as in-house caterer, flexible options (open bar, cash bar, drink tickets)](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=731.0)
  - [Outside catering allowed in Above the Rim space (with liquor license relinquishment process)](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Multiple bars and eateries available in larger spaces](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1095.0)

### Event Types and Setups

  - [Happy hours, executive dinners, conferences with breakout sessions](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=80.0)
  - [Arena floor can be set up for "town hall" style presentations](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Long table dinners, theater-style seating, reception layouts all possible](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
  - [No noise restrictions; DJs and live music welcome](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Booking and Pricing

  - [Pricing structure changing to all-in model (venue fee + staffing combined)](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2026.0)
  - [New pricing expected within a month](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
  - [Event enhancements available (trophy appearance, arena tours, locker room tours)](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1302.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kaylee to send informational deck, preferred vendor list, and catering menu](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Marissa to review materials and consider options for various client needs](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2096.0)
  - [Schedule on-site tour to view spaces in person](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=1924.0)
  - [Follow up on new pricing structure once available](https://fathom.video/share/D3Rx8fx2WtzdvhV_FbFzQ6Qzhfn9xsJW?tab=summary&timestamp=2079.0)
